faqs.question: Is it worth joining Sengunthar Arts And Science College?
faqs.answer:
The placement details for the Class of 2024 are yet to be released. However, SASC has released the placement details for batch passed out in 2022. faqs.question: Is Sengunthar Arts and Science College admission open?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sengunthar Arts And Science College admission open. Intereseted students can visit the official website to apply for the respective courses. The college offers courses, such as BCom, MSc, MCA etc., at the UG and PG level. The university also offers doctorate-level courses besides the UG and PG courses. To get admission to SASC, candidates will be selected based on merit-based.

faqs.question: How to apply online at Sengunthar Arts and Science College?
faqs.answer:
Candidates can apply online for UG, PG or PhD courses at Sengunthar Arts And Science College. Below are the application steps to apply for courses at the college:
Step one: Visit the official website, i.e., senguarts.co.in.
Step two: Click on 'Apply Now' on the Home page.
Step three: Register with the basic details such as mobile number, valid email ID etc. to generate login credentials.
Step four: Login to fill out the application form.
Step five: Upload the documents and pay the application fee.
Step six: Submit the application form.

faqs.question: How do I get a seat at Sengunthar Arts and Science College?
faqs.answer:
To secure a seat at Sengunthar Arts And Science College, students can check the following steps presented below:
Visit the official website and complete the online application process.
Ensure eligibility and selection criteria as per course requirement.
Should match the selection criteria 
Upon being selected, pay the specified fee to confirm and secure your seat.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SASC - Sengunthar Arts And Science College offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. On the other hand, at the PG level, the SASC - Sengunthar Arts And Science College offers MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. The fees for SASC - Sengunthar Arts And Science College courses range between INR 16,000 to 72,000.

review_content.Placements: The placement for my batch and my senior batch was good as it was about 90%. The highest package was 3.2 lakh, the lowest 1.2 lakh and the average 1.5 lakh per annum. review_summary.college_name: Kavitha Memorial Degree and PG College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It's the best college for the M.Sc. in Mathematics course.

content.Placements: The student placement rate in my courses is approximately 92 percent. The maximum salary granted is 23 LPA. The average pay is 13 LPA, while the minimum wage is 7 LPA. NASA, NIST, and the National Security Agency are among the top companies that have visited our campus. In my analysis, over 90 percent of the students received internships from companies. The most popular roles in my course are Quantitative Analyst and Algorithm Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The hotel facilities, notably the new guest room, are excellent. Wi-Fi is provided 24 hours a day. The water does not always run in the motel, although this is remedied soon. The food at the hotels is remarkable, but not horrible; it's average. The college's facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Maths, Physics, Computer Science) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My life is very good, enjoying it with good teaching, classes, and placements.

content.Placements: Students are placed in my course, 80 members got placed, and the highest package is from my course. Top roles are offered in my course. It offers internships in Infosys and other companies. For my course students, the highest packages are offered. Many companies are tied up with my college, so it is a very good course.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available. But hostel facilities are not available. Sports games are available. Canteen is not available. Sports like cricket and all games are available. Classrooms and toilets are very clean. There is a big place for playing sports games. All facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Computer Applications - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Kavitha Memorial Degree and PG College.

content.Placements: It is a good course. Almost 80% of students got placed in our college. They offer low salary packages. The highest salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. MNCs visit our college to recruit students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. We have a computer lab. Classrooms are comfortable. The hostel facility is not available in our college. Many private hostels are available near our college. It is the best college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Maths, Physics, Computer Science) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with its placements.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students got placed but the salary packages are not good. There are no top recruiting companies in our college. Internships are also not offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: There are no hostel facilities in our college. Our campus is not Wi-Fi-enabled. Laboratory is better. Our classrooms are not good. There is no canteen facility in our college. Medical facilities are not available. Sports and games are better.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-qualified and knowledgeable. They are well-experiences at teaching. Our course curriculum makes students industry-ready. The pass percentage is 70%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Maths, Physics, Computer Science) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty.

content.Placements: Actually due to covid we did not get any placements, mine is 2019-2021 batch. But recently after completion of my graduation, placement drive occurred in our college and 2 members from my class attended and were selected but the package is less, i.e., only 2 lpa.
content.Infrastructure: First of all, in my classroom, there is proper ventilation, board and benches but there is no wi-fi. We have computer lab and Physics lab for my course and there is a library that has a lot of books and there is no hostel facility. If we want to stay in hostel then we should choose a private hostel. There are many private hostels near our college.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed in our college is 90%. Almost all students get placed in core job roles. The highest salary package offered to students in our college is 7 LPA. The internship percentage is 100% in our college.

review_content.Faculty: Faculty members were good. Classes conducted by them were up to the mark. Teachers were highly qualified. Our syllabus was conducted by Kerala University. Semester exams were tough but we can crack exams easily. The pass percentage was 60%.

placement_data.title: Rathinam Technical Campus Powered by Sunstone Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The placement drive for season 2025 at Rathinam Technical Campus Powered by Sunstone recorded the highest package of INR 26 LPA. The average package offered to the graduating batch of 2025 was INR 4.6 LPA . The season recorded more than 1 200 recruiters and the ROI was 63% higher . Leading recruiters that took part in the recruitment process include- HDFC, Amul, Wipro and many more.

Sunstone’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) provides students with access to over 200 guaranteed placement opportunities, or they can receive a refund of their first-year tuition if the placements do not fulfill the commitment.

To qualify for POP, students need to maintain at least a 70% average attendance in all credit and non-credit classes each semester. They must also pass all exams with a minimum score of 80% or an equivalent CGPA, and they should not have any backlogs. Furthermore, students must ensure that all fee payments are made according to the schedule specified in the offer letter. Finally, students are required to strictly follow the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the duration of the program.

review_content.Other: This college is established by Government of Kerala under CAPE (Corporative Academy of Professional Education). They provide the latest infrastructural facilities, including 2 well-established libraries and 2 computer labs. The placement cells are active and try to bring more companies to the college. They conduct mentoring and various interactive activities every month. The teachers encourage current affairs and concentrate on the application-oriented study. The college organizes management fests every year and encourages students to participate in various management fest conducted by other colleges also. The location is very convenient, just 1km from NH47, and the frequency of buses is high. College bus facility is also there. The college does not provide hostel facilities for MBA students, so students need to opt for PGs.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2014

content.Other: This college is established by Government of Kerala under CAPE (Corporative Academy of Professional Education). They provide the latest infrastructural facilities, including 2 well-established libraries and 2 computer labs. The placement cells are active and try to bring more companies to the college. They conduct mentoring and various interactive activities every month. The teachers encourage current affairs and concentrate on the application-oriented study. The college organizes management fests every year and encourages students to participate in various management fest conducted by other colleges also. The location is very convenient, just 1km from NH47, and the frequency of buses is high. College bus facility is also there. The college does not provide hostel facilities for MBA students, so students need to opt for PGs.
